name: ai-pdlc
description: Tool-agnostic AI-powered product development lifecycle handbook — 9 phases, 14 role swim lanes, ~130 activities, ~260 artifacts/outcomes — packaged as a Claude Code plugin. Installs the ai-pdlc-navigator skill plus 14 role teammate agents (Product Sponsor, PO, BA, Designer, Architect, Security, SRE, PM, Developer, QA, Release Manager, Writer, Sales & Marketing, Customer Support), all grounded in the same bundled handbook content.
